section.title: Open-Ended Feedback
section.description: Please provide brief written responses to the questions below. Your insights will help add context, surface practical experiences, and identify opportunities or concerns in your own words.

questions.hint: Based on your experience, what challenges, risks, or unintended effects (if any) have you observed when using AI in project management?
questions.guidance: Consider topics such as accuracy, trust, ethics, governance, integration effort, data protection, over-reliance, or workforce impact. Please write 2–5 sentences (minimum 50 characters).

questions.hint: Which specific project management tasks have you automated or substantially reduced through the use of AI?
questions.guidance: Examples may include reporting, data aggregation, meeting documentation, forecasting, analysis, or coordination activities. Please write 2–5 sentences (minimum 50 characters).

questions.hint: What improvements or new capabilities would you like to see in AI tools to better support project management?
questions.guidance: You may comment on missing features, usability, governance controls, integration with existing tools, or unmet needs in project management. Please write 2–5 sentences (minimum 50 characters).

questions.hint: If you could design an ideal AI assistant for your role, which three project management activities would you want it to handle end-to-end with minimal human intervention?
questions.guidance: Focus on activities where full or near-full automation could realistically add value. Please write 2–5 sentences (minimum 50 characters).

questions.text: Impact on Hybrid Technical / Project Roles (Optional):
questions.hint: If your primary role is not a full-time Project Manager (e.g., Developer, Architect, Tech Lead), how has AI affected the project management aspects of your responsibilities?
questions.guidance: Optional. Skip this question if you are a full-time Project Manager. If applicable, please write 2–5 sentences.
